# template-improve — LLM Reference

Post-project template improvement. Reads a completed client project, diffs against template defaults, applies improvements back to client-marketing-template. Run after each client ships.

## Triggers

- After a client project reaches M4 (deployed + passing)
- User says "learn from [client]" or "update template from [client]"
- After a significant pattern discovery mid-project

## Invocation

```
/template-improve                          # reads current project
/template-improve signaturevn              # reads named project
/template-improve ~/code/clients/pho-saigon-88
```

## What it reads (client project)

- .claude/agents/cleared-queue.md
- .claude/agents/frontend-developer.ctx.md
- apps/web/config/client.ts
- apps/web/components/sections/ (new sections built)
- retrospective.md (if exists)

## What it writes (template only)

- design/tokens/*.ts — preset refinements
- apps/web/components/sections/ — new variants or sections
- .claude/agents/*.ctx.template.md — new copy/UX rules
- oms-init.json — updated section defaults
- LEARNINGS.md — retrospective append

## What it does NOT do

- Never modifies the client project
- Never adds client-specific logic to the template
- Never adds a section with fewer than 3 variants
